title: quercus alnoides
intro: Quercus alnoides, also known as Chinese white oak or Chinese silver oak, is a deciduous tree native to China and parts of Asia, characterized by its broad leaves and white or pale gray bark. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Quercus alnoides include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Quercus alnoides is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
